town.title: The town of your business
town.sub: Step into each building to operate: sell at the Shop, manage the Warehouse, bake in the Workshop. Whatever needs your attention floats over the town.

oficina.name: The Office
oficina.tagline: Set up the business, your customers and packaging rules.

bodega.name: The Warehouse
bodega.tagline: Your supplies and stock. Adjust waste and counts.

tienda.name: The Shop
tienda.tagline: The heart: build quotes and sell them.

obrador.name: The Workshop
obrador.tagline: Produce orders and keep your recipes.

hud.subtitle: The manual game
hud.resetBody: This clears all your progress ({{done}} of {{total}} challenges) and takes you back to the first challenge. It does not touch your spreadsheet: only the tutorial progress.

map.title:
Learn by playing,
challenge by challenge
map.sub: We walk you through the costing system: you do each step in your real spreadsheet and mark "Done it" to move on. Your progress is saved only in this browser.
map.finished: 🏆 You completed every challenge! You can review any mission.
map.lockedHint: Complete the previous one to unlock
map.footer: Prefer to read it all at once? Open the full manual.

levelDone.sub: You completed the {{missions}} missions of this level. You have {{done}} of {{total}} challenges ({{percent}}%).
levelDone.gameFinished: 🏆 You finished the game! You now master the system.
